use_cases: Creating attention-grabbing hero headlines with animated shimmer effects on text
Highlighting promotional content with gradient-based text animations
Adding scroll-triggered text reveals in landing page sections
Creating dynamic pricing or feature callouts with visual emphasis
Enhancing brand messaging with glossy, premium-feeling animated typography
ai_summary: A reusable text component that applies a premium shimmer animation effect using CSS gradients and Framer Motion. The shimmer sweeps across text creating a glossy, attention-grabbing visual. Supports scroll-triggered animation, configurable colors, duration, delays, and repetition for flexible use in hero sections, promotional banners, or anywhere prominent animated text is needed.
